_note: Optional purpose-tag overrides for wheels whose auto-derived purposes are wrong or misleading. Keys are wheel ids; values replace the derived set entirely. Vocabulary: offense, crit, str, shield, heal, death_resist, keyflare, aliemus, card_economy, tentacle, poison, counter, embryo, economy. Derivation lives in lib/wheel-fit.ts and reads SKeyDB searchTags + effect text + mainstat, so most wheels need no entry here.
